message:
fix(codec): remove skip_serializing_if from varbincode-serialized structs (ft-1qbjk)

Root cause: #[serde(skip_serializing_if = "Option::is_none")] on
tiered_scrollback_status in GetPaneRenderChangesResponse and
GetPaneRenderableDimensionsResponse caused varbincode deserialization
failures. varbincode is a positional binary format — when
skip_serializing_if skips the None tag byte, all subsequent field
positions shift, producing "failed to fill whole buffer" codec errors.

This fixed all 16 deterministically-failing mux_pool tests involving
GetPaneRenderChangesResponse PDU. Also fixed usize::try_from
compilation issue in buffered_frame_len and added regression test for
roundtrip with tiered_scrollback_status: None.

Verified: 70/70 mux_pool tests pass, 111/111 codec tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
